Yeah, okay, so By the way For me, this is it's so powerful That I can change my state on a dime with this stuff and I was always good at state management So I I have an ability to block out. I always have right when you're being chased by the FBI for 10 years You learn how to do that, right? But the truth is is that you know, this stuff is really really taking my ability to a not just manage my own state and You know really and really here's the thing It is crucial in matters. It's not when you're closing a deal when you're brainstorming When you're looking to overcome challenges in your business so often what happens is the promise that we have as business owners Is that when things aren't going well? We start to try to deal with them when we're feeling disempowered We don't make good decisions when we're feeling fearful and disempowered We make our best decisions when we're feeling certain and confident and clear So it's the the benefits of this is so profound and cut to so many different things Okay, that it just just trust me on this use it for a while and you will see it gets to the point Where you almost don't even sometimes you don't even need anymore because it's just so you could almost Imagine this you can almost remember the smell the same way So even if I don't happen to have it on me I can just imagine that smell of boom-boom and it creates certainty in me because I've linked it over so long to this feeling of certainty
